nurtureTemplates.value_drop:
Hi {{name}},

I'm {{botName}}, reaching out on behalf of {{tenantName}}.

I saw you were discussing sales strategies. Quick observation from watching {{tenantName}} scale companies: Most founders treat sales as a numbers volume game, but it's actually a conversion rate game. If your cold email is at 1%, doubling volume just burns your domain. You have to fix the offer first.

Just a little value to chew on today.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.testimonial:
Hey {{name}},

Real quick — {{tenantName}} recently worked with a company stuck at that revenue plateau you mentioned. 

They dialed in the specific system we use, and within 60 days their pipeline multiplied by 3x. Same team, same budget, just a better conversion engine.

Thought you'd appreciate knowing it's possible.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.authority_transfer:
Hey {{name}},

I should give you a better idea of why I mentioned {{tenantName}}.

They've spent {{years}} in {{profession}}. Their biggest recent win: {{biggestWin}}. What makes their approach lethal: {{differentiator}}.

We don't sell to everyone. We specifically work with {{icp}}.

If that's you, a brief strategy session will probably uncover some serious blind spots in your funnel.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.personal_checkin:
Hi {{name}},

Just checking in — how are the revenue metrics tracking this quarter?

No sales pitch here. {{tenantName}} asked me to keep in touch with operators we respect.

Any big wins or roadblocks?

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part1:
Hey {{name}},

Quick pulse check.

On a scale of 1-10, how urgent is solving your current pipeline/sales bottleneck? (1 = We're fine with status quo, 10 = We bleed money every day it isn't fixed).

Just drop a number.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part2:
Appreciate the transparency.

What would it take to be a 10? Is it budget approval, timing, or just not believing you have the right solution mapped out?

Just trying to understand the exact friction point.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.gap_closing:
Understood — {{answer}}.

That's a classic B2B hurdle. {{tenantName}} has seen that a dozen times, and it's heavily addressed in our core framework (which is how we generated {{biggestWin}}).

Does knowing we have a specific roadmap to bypass that friction change your urgency (1-10)?

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.scarcity_takeaway:
Hey {{name}},

I'll be direct — {{tenantName}} is taking on two new B2B clients this month to implement our scaling systems.

I don't want to follow up if it's just not the right time for your operation. 

If you want to map out a sprint, let's talk. If not, I'll step entirely out of your inbox.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.pattern_interrupt:
Hey {{name}},

Before I close your file, let me ask one thing.

If your biggest competitor installed a system today that booked them 15 more qualified meetings a week, how much market share would you lose by Q4?

Inaction isn't a neutral choice; it costs revenue. 

If you're ready to build the engine, say "Let's scale."

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.final_takeaway:
Hey {{name}},

This is my final outreach. I'm taking you out of my active pipeline.

{{tenantName}} works with decisive companies, and I totally respect if the timing isn't right for yours.

Best of luck closing out the year!

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.slow_drip_value:
Hey {{name}},

Checking in. Thought you might find this relevant.

{{tenantName}} has been refining {{differentiator}} and the results are pretty disruptive.

Hope your sales are tracking well. Reach out if you ever want to re-engage.

— {{botName}}
